title: Sprint 58 — WorldModel Wiring + Tool Expansion + P1 Audit Fixes
description: Sprint 58 plan: Wave A covers quick wins (TSK-0312, TSK-0314, TSK-0315) and P1 audit fixes (PlaceBlockGoal premature completion, denylist normalization, CommandExecutionEnabled default). Wave B covers Sprint 58 main tasks: TSK-0309 (WorldModel.Predict/Reconcile), TSK-0310 (IGoalPrecondition), TSK-0311 (missing tools). TSK-0292/0293 (ABS decomposition) remain deferred per 3-audit consensus.

comments.author: anonymous
comments.body: Sprint 58 Waves A+B complete. 8 of 9 planned tasks done (815 tests pass). Wave C (TSK-0311 missing tools) deferred to next sprint. Handoff: Data/Pages/Handoffs/sprint-58-wavea-b-complete.md. TSK-0292/0293 (ABS decomposition) remain deferred per 3-audit consensus.
